voice_note: Callum (ElevenLabs premade) — warm, laid-back, lightly gravelly storyteller. One announcer for the whole game.

sfx.prompt: Retro 16-bit videogame jump sound, soft bouncy spring boing, cute and chill, single short note rising, clean, no reverb tail
Retro 16-bit videogame double-jump sound, quick playful boing rising higher in pitch than a normal jump, two fast ascending notes, cute, clean, no reverb
Retro 16-bit videogame coin pickup chime, single bright cheerful ding, short punchy attack, fast decay, clean, no reverb tail
Retro 16-bit videogame magic ring pickup, crystalline sparkling shimmer chime, two quick ascending glassy notes, brighter and more magical than a coin, fast decay
Retro 16-bit videogame player hurt sound, soft cartoonish ouch thud, two-note descending, gentle not violent, muffled bump, fast decay, no distortion
Retro 16-bit videogame dash sound, quick smooth air whoosh sweeping left to right, short breathy swish, clean, fast decay
Retro 16-bit videogame power-up fanfare, bright happy major arpeggio rising, sparkly and triumphant but chill, warm chiptune tones
Retro 16-bit videogame throw sound, quick light whip whoosh of a small object flying, single fast swish, short, clean, no impact
Retro 16-bit videogame enemy hit, soft satisfying thunk with a tiny bright chime layered on top, punchy attack, fast decay, playful not violent
Retro 16-bit videogame small explosion, crunchy pixelated boom, round and cartoonish, soft low thump body, quick decay, playful arcade style, no harsh distortion
Retro 16-bit videogame fire breath, short flame burst whoosh with light crackle, warm airy roar, cartoonish dragon puff, fades out quickly
Retro 16-bit videogame denied action buzz, soft polite two-tone descending blip, muted, short, gentle negative feedback, not harsh

voice.text: Level One… The Smoke Realm. Stay chill, Lil Blunt.
Level Two… Crystal Caverns. Diamonds in the deep.
Level Three… GoldMine Rush. Strike it rich, partner.
Uh oh… the Tax Auditor wants his cut!
The Crystalline Bureaucrat demands your paperwork!
The Claim Jumper's after your gold, partner!
Level complete! Smooth moves, Lil Blunt.
Game complete! One chill nugget… one giant win.
